black box ON left side of counter
wooden planks ON floor near black box
robot arm ABOVE counter, interacting with objects

micro_instructions.text: move metallic bowl toward white plate
place metallic bowl on white plate

augmented_instructions.text: Lift the metallic bowl from the counter and carefully position it onto the white plate with a red rim, ensuring it sits stably without tipping.
augmented_instructions.strategy: add emphasis on stability and careful placement

augmented_instructions.text: Using the robot arm, first approach and grasp the metallic bowl, then lift it and move it horizontally to align above the white plate with red rim before lowering it gently onto the plate.
